messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0039",
  "title": "媒体声音",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0040",
    "title": "26媒体声音",
    "page_range": "27",
    "summary": "This section, titled \"26媒体声音\" (Media Voices), serves as a brief reference listing two Chinese gaming industry media entities: \"游戏葡萄\" (GameGrape) and \"GameLook.\" It contains no dates, definitions, procedures, analytical claims, metrics, tables, figures, or supporting evidence. The content is strictly limited to entity identification, making it retrievable only for queries regarding which specific media outlets are referenced on page 27."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0042",
    "title": "游戏葡萄",
    "page_range": "28-29",
    "summary": "This section provides a retrieval-ready overview of the Chinese mobile game overseas market, answering questions across the following dimensions:\n- **Topics:** 2025 market performance, genre evolution, regional market shifts, and 2026 competitive strategy trends.\n- **Entities:** 游戏葡萄 (source/publication), Chinese mobile game industry, SLG+X hybrid gameplay, merge games, mini-games, Europe/US/Japan/Korea (core markets), Middle East, Latin America.\n- **Dates:** 2025 (analysis year), 2026 (forecast year).\n- **Metrics:** Full-year overseas revenue stably exceeded $20 billion, setting a new historical high.\n- **Claims & Predictions:** Traditional hardcore game dominance is loosening; emerging genres and markets are driving growth; 2026 competition will shift from content/user acquisition to gameplay integration and thematic insight; success will depend on deep cultural localization and combining lightweight presentation with hardcore mechanics to attract broader audiences.\n- **Evidence Types:** Industry trend analysis, market observation, revenue reporting, strategic forecasting.\n- **Definitions, Procedures, Tables, Figures:** None present in this section."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0043",
    "title": "GameLook",
    "page_range": "29-30",
    "summary": "This section answers questions regarding 2025 overseas Chinese game market trends, genre performance, publisher strategies, and specific financial/operational metrics.\n- **Topics & Trends:** 2025 overseas market dynamics; dominance of SLG and casual merge/elimination genres; major publishers' strategic shift toward PC/console and cross-platform AAA titles; high barriers and localization needs for overseas IAP mini-games; operational focus on evergreen/long-tail games.\n- **Key Entities & Dates:** 2025; Publishers: Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, Lemon Micro Fun (柠檬微趣), DianDian Interactive (点点互动); Titles: *Kingshot*, *Delta Force* (三角洲行动), *Where Winds Meet* (燕云十六声); Source: GameLook.\n- **Metrics & Evidence:** TOP30 overseas Chinese mobile games consistently include ~10 SLG and ~6 casual IAP titles. Lemon Micro Fun exceeded 1 billion RMB in monthly revenue. DianDian Interactive surpassed 150 million RMB monthly revenue for merge casual games. *Kingshot* is cited as a global casual SLG hit. *Delta Force* and *Where Winds Meet* achieved overseas PC/console market breakthroughs.\n- **Strategic Claims & Procedures:** Focusing on core tracks and evergreen strategies is validated by market results. Big publishers maintain stable mobile revenue by prioritizing PC/console, third-party payments, and AAA cross-platform development. Revitalizing older products involves adopting third-party payments, implementing hybrid monetization (混变模式), and integrating AI for content updates. Overseas mini-game success requires quality upgrades and localized gameplay/themes.\n- **Definitions/Concepts:** Casual SLG (休闲SLG), Evergreen/Long-tail game strategy (长青游戏战略), Hybrid monetization model (混变模式), IAP mini-games (IAP内购型小游戏).\n- **Evidence Types:** Market ranking distributions, monthly revenue figures,..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0044",
    "title": "GAMING USER ACQUISITION IN 2025: WHAT ACTUALLY CHANGED 2025年游戏获客：真实变革何在03",
    "page_range": "30",
    "summary": "This section functions as a heading that identifies the core topic of gaming user acquisition (UA) market shifts and strategies in 2025. It can answer questions about the primary subject (gaming UA) and the specific focal year (2025). No specific entities, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, tables, figures, or evidence types are present in the provided text. Consequently, it is only retrievable for high-level topic classification and temporal context regarding 2025 gaming UA changes."
  }
]

message.content: This parent section, "媒体声音" (Media Voices), spans pages 27–30 and compiles industry insights from two Chinese gaming media outlets: "游戏葡萄" (GameGrape) and "GameLook," followed by a heading on 2025 gaming user acquisition. The content covers 2025 market performance and 2026 competitive strategy trends for the Chinese mobile game overseas market. Key topics include genre evolution (SLG+X hybrids, merge games, mini-games), regional market shifts (core EU/US/JP/KR markets versus Middle East and Latin America), and publisher strategic pivots toward PC/console cross-platform AAA development and evergreen operations. Notable entities include publishers Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, Lemon Micro Fun, and DianDian Interactive, alongside titles *Kingshot*, *Delta Force*, and *Where Winds Meet*. Reported metrics indicate full-year overseas revenue stably exceeded $20 billion, the TOP30 overseas mobile games consistently feature ~10 SLG and ~6 casual IAP titles, Lemon Micro Fun surpassed 1 billion RMB in monthly revenue, and DianDian Interactive exceeded 150 million RMB monthly for merge casual games. Strategic claims assert that traditional hardcore dominance is loosening, with 2026 competition shifting toward gameplay integration, thematic insight, and deep cultural localization. Operational procedures for revitalizing legacy products involve adopting third-party payments, implementing hybrid monetization models, and integrating AI for content updates. Defined concepts include Casual SLG, Evergreen/Long-tail game strategy, Hybrid monetization model, and IAP mini-games. Evidence types comprise industry trend analysis, market observation, revenue reporting, strategic forecasting, and market ranking distributions. No tables or figures are present in this section.
